qa022.capturedFrom: local seed (3 consecutive runs, port 22437) — replace with median-of-5 CI runs post-merge per perf-baseline-update.md
qa022.notes: FR-21 chunked-insertion frame-time p50 during a 1MB Source paste. Local consistently lands at 16.7ms (60fps tick); CI runners are typically 1.5-2x slower. The baseline-relative assertion is `p50 < max(2 * p50Ms, 32)` — 32ms is the absolute floor (one double-budget at 60fps); 2x p50Ms is the regression ceiling. Real regressions trip the ceiling without runner-speed variance tripping the floor. Key naming: `qa022` (lowercase, no dash) vs the `QA-022` ID used in SPEC.md / test names / documentation — shell-quoting friendliness, see perf-baseline-update.md §Schema.
